meta.lastCommit: eacf877 "site: bigger labeled visitor counter, More-projects section, copyright/ownership notice"
meta.headline: Co-op for Fears to Fathom: Woodbury Getaway
meta.subhead: Play Fears to Fathom: Woodbury Getaway with a friend. An unofficial co-op mod for the Steam game — one of you hosts, the other connects, and the scary parts happen to both of you at the same time.

reVerification.note: Every FindObjectOfType<T> across the non-Cabin sync modules names a real type declared in decompiled/. 93.7% of named field reflections resolve to declared fields in the matching class; misses concentrate on ParkingLotManager and fail safe (the GetField cache returns null and the lookup no-ops).

scenes.name: Cabin
scenes.summary: Most playtested. Full NPC brain coverage, mini-games, cooking, ambient, opening drive.
synced: Mike NPC brains (MikeCabin, MikeFishing, MikePostEating, MikeAfterHiding, MikeCabinCookController) via NpcBrainState
CabinHiker + HikerCabinController hiker-window sequence (state enums, go/moving/reachedPos/followingHost)
HostFixingSink, Nora, cat — generic NPC registry
CabinHouseManager boolean story flags (full set)
CabinGameManager sequence + player state + inConversation
Doors (CabinDoor + NOTLonely_Door.DoorScript) and holdables
JengaController + OuijaController mini-games (state, audio, transforms, planchette)
Casserole/oven cooking props + plate masks + eating rig weights
Living-room TV clip identity + playback time
Basement/closet/outside/flashlight lights + sink/dishwashing visuals
Seated proxies (couch / Ouija table / board-game seats / bed)
Opening RV/truck driving intro: state, lights, brake/turn, bobblehead, radio (clip + playback), bag/door/light actives, truck visual transforms
Randomized traffic pool: pool active state + AiTransform correction
Mike animation-state replication (StateHash/Loop/Phase10/Transition/NextStateHash)
notSynced: Late-game endgame sequence edge cases (still being playtested)

scenes.name: Pizzeria
scenes.summary: Opening drive-in, scene state, props/media, vending, triggers. NPC registry in place.
synced: PizzeriaGameManager: current player mode, first-conversation timers, pizza/burp gates, phone UI, text-reply unlocks, soda-can seating
MikePizzeria + PizzeriaHiker + PizzeriaFoldingGuy + PizzeriaNPC (generic NPC registry)
MikeDrivingInPizzeriaScene opening: vehicle/path state, engine/key/handbrake audio, headlights/panel/bobblehead, transform correction
Pizza box/slice/lid visibility + box-folding worker prop sync (with local folding brain suppression)
PizzeriaTVAudioProximity (range, inside-pizzeria volume)
PizzeriaChair interactability/layer state during pickup/sitting/eating/burp/get-up
TV/radio media: advert/news clip selection, playback time, radio track choice
Doors + light-trigger state + phone canvas/network state + truck triggers + keys UI + one-shot audio cues
Camera/control: driving freeze, global/sitting FOV zoom, dialogue camera, zoom transitions, main-camera FOV, look-target, trash/truck layer switching, editor-start music
Player seat/drive/camera prop state, pizza-on-table visibility, boundary collider masks, out-of-play-zone trigger state
Shared vending machine state (dialogue cameras, triggers, slot/sliding colliders, soda-can visibility/kinematic, audio, player-camera FOV)
Generic triggers: OnTriggerSub / OnTriggerDisplaySub / OnTrigger / TriggerEventInvoker
DontDestroyRoadTripMusic fade/playback handoff from RoadTrip
Traffic trigger active/enabled + pool/active-state with AiTransform correction
notSynced: A handful of one-shot props called out by Compare-SceneDiscoveryDump diffs

scenes.name: RoadTrip
scenes.summary: Camera + manager timers, vehicles, bobblehead, traffic, triggers. Typed vehicle smoothing landed in 0.4.0.
synced: RoadTripGameManager: auto-conversation timers, road-bump timers, phone state, text-reply unlocks, look-at zoom flags
MikeInCar + MikeTruckInLoopScene + MikeTruckGoingToNora + MikeTruckInParking (generic NPC registry, typed vehicle state smoothing)
RoadTrip camera look-target sync (Mike/bus/deer cinematic focus)
Dialogue camera activation, car camera rotation/freeze, FOV flags
RoadTrip bobblehead: active/layer-switched, animator state/speed, transform correction
Car radio playback + school bus active + horror audio + RoadTripTruck brake/deer-run + truck/deer audio
Deer animation state + deer/school-bus transform correction
Mike-in-car hidden conversation flags + bus/deer trigger actives
Generic triggers: OnTriggerSub / OnTriggerDisplaySub / OnTrigger / TriggerEventInvoker
Traffic pool/active-state with AiTransform correction + one-shot/speed/spline trigger settings

scenes.name: Office
scenes.summary: Most recent deep coverage. Full game/player state + every subcontroller. Least playtested.
synced: OfficeLayoutGameManager: scene/player mode, first-person enablement, end-scene yellow intro/audio, coffee-sip hand animation, phone/restroom triggers, throw permission, camera FOV
YellowIntroManager: timer, current index, text visibility mask (with local intro brain suppression)
OfficeWorkerMonitor: clip identity, playback time, material/renderer state (with monitor brain suppression)
OfficeWorker conversation visual + audio state
TableManager / ComputerManager / CoffeeMachineManager / OfficePhone / TypeMasterManager / TypingShooterComputerManager subcontrollers
OfficeRadio (track/time/button)
OfficeFridge + OfficeMicrowave (door/light/audio)
OfficeToiletManager (stall/pee/lid/seat)
OfficeJanitor (jumpscare/cleaning)
OfficeLayoutUIManager + Office peeing UI
Shared VendingMachineManager (cameras, triggers, slot/sliding colliders, soda-can state, audio, player-camera FOV)
OnTriggerOfficeBoundsSub + OnTriggerSub + OnTriggerDisplaySub + OnTrigger + TriggerEventInvoker
Actor + movable appliance/toilet part transform correction
notSynced: Discovery-only gaps surfaced by SceneDiscoveryDump diff

scenes.name: ParkingLot
scenes.summary: Game/player state, elevator, walking cop, anti-throw, intro/call. Some subcontrollers still discovery-only.
synced: ParkingLotGameManager: call timing, intro state, phone ringing, talking/hugging mode, throw permission, first-person, camera FOV
Stranger / Mike / suitcase / truck / car subcontroller state
ParkingLotElevatorManager: travel, doors, audio, anti-throw
WalkingCopController: NavMesh brain suppression, animator/target mirroring, transform correction
UI/intro/phone flags + anti-throw zones
Elevator door transforms + truck tailgate transform correction
OnTriggerSub + OnTriggerDisplaySub + OnTrigger + TriggerEventInvoker
notSynced: Additional subcontrollers flagged by discovery dump but not yet synced
